projectDescription: An AI-powered study platform that transforms any text material into interactive learning experiences through summaries, quizzes, slide presentations, flow charts, and anatomy maps.
keyFeatures: Intelligent quiz generation with real-time answer evaluation
AI slide deck generation with DALL-E images
Flow chart generation from hierarchical material
Anatomy map generation with labeled body systems
Voice answer input and text-to-speech feedback
OpenAI-compatible LLM support (including local Ollama models)
Email + password authentication with JWT sessions
AWS S3 file storage for uploads and generated images
publicApiSurface: POST /trpc/study.createSession — create a study session from pasted material
POST /trpc/study.generateQuestions — generate quiz questions for a session
POST /trpc/study.evaluateAnswer — evaluate a student answer with AI feedback
POST /trpc/study.generateSlides — generate a slide deck from study material
POST /trpc/study.generateFlowChart — generate a flow chart from hierarchical material
POST /trpc/study.generateAnatomyChart — generate an anatomy map from medical material
GET /trpc/study.getSessions — retrieve all study sessions for the current user
GET /trpc/study.getSession — retrieve a single study session by ID
GET /trpc/study.getQuestions — retrieve quiz questions for a session
GET /trpc/study.getAnswers — retrieve submitted answers for a session
POST /trpc/auth.logout — log out the current user
GET /trpc/auth.me — retrieve the current authenticated user
